subject: RE: Introduction: Ayrton Mansi | Broadbeach Development Project
snippet: Dear Alexander Thank you for the referral and thinking of us. Ayrton, a pleasure to be introduced. So that we can make sure the correct experts are on the call, it would assist if you could let us know
